name: MSC Industrial Direct Co., Inc.
description: MSC Industrial Direct Co., Inc. is a leading North American distributor of metalworking and maintenance, repair, and operations (MRO) products and services. With a vast catalog of industrial supplies, the company helps customers improve their productivity and operational efficiency. MSC offers a comprehensive range of products, including cutting tools, measuring instruments, fasteners, and safety equipment. Headquartered in Melville, New York, the company serves a diverse customer base through its extensive distribution network, e-commerce platform, and dedicated sales teams, providing tailored solutions to support manufacturing and industrial operations across the United States and beyond.
